table.--tab-switcher-menubar-background: linear-gradient(to top, color-mix(in srgb, rgb(0, 53, 107) 90%, black 100%), transparent)

tbody.--tab-switcher-menubar-background: linear-gradient(to top, color-mix(in srgb, rgb(0, 53, 107) 90%, black 100%), transparent)

tbody tr:nth-child(even).--tab-switcher-menubar-background: linear-gradient(to top, color-mix(in srgb, rgb(0, 53, 107) 90%, black 100%), transparent)
tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: color(srgb 0 0.115033 0.247495 / 0.9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).--tab-switcher-menubar-background: linear-gradient(to top, color-mix(in srgb, rgb(0, 53, 107) 90%, black 100%), transparent)
tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: color(srgb 0 0.115033 0.247495 / 0.9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
